title: Diagnose and repair LNG fuel systems
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Diagnose and repair LNG fuel systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to diagnose and repair LNG fuel system

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source and interpret diagnostic information 1.3 Analyse diagnostic options and source testing strategy, selecting those required for the circumstances 1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks 1.5 Select and check diagnostic tools and equipment required for testing strategy for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source and interpret diagnostic information 1.3 Analyse diagnostic options and source testing strategy, selecting those required for the circumstances 1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks 1.5 Select and check diagnostic tools and equipment required for testing strategy for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Source and interpret diagnostic information 1.3 Analyse diagnostic options and source testing strategy, selecting those required for the circumstances 1.4 Identify hazards associated with the work and manage risks 1.5 Select and check diagnostic tools and equipment required for testing strategy for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to diagnose and repair LNG fuel system

elements.title: Diagnose LNG fuel system

pcs.text: Perform diagnostic tests set out in testing strategy according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Identify faults from diagnostic test results and determine causes of faults 2.3 Confirm and report cause of fault according to workplace procedures2.4 Develop and report recommendations for required repairs or adjustments according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform diagnostic tests set out in testing strategy according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Identify faults from diagnostic test results and determine causes of faults 2.3 Confirm and report cause of fault according to workplace procedures2.4 Develop and report recommendations for required repairs or adjustments according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform diagnostic tests set out in testing strategy according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.2 Identify faults from diagnostic test results and determine causes of faults 2.3 Confirm and report cause of fault according to workplace procedures2.4 Develop and report recommendations for required repairs or adjustments according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Diagnose LNG fuel system

elements.title: Repair LNG fuel system

pcs.text: Source and interpret repair information3.2 Analyse repair options and select those required for the circumstances3.3 Select and check repair tools, equipment and materials 3.4 Carry out repairs and component replacements and adjustments according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, safety and environmental requirements, and AS/NZ 2739 Natural gas (NG) fuel systems for vehicle engines, and without causing damage to components or system3.5 Carry out post-repair testing according to workplace procedures and AS/NZ 2739 to confirm fault rectification, and rectify any further problems detected as having been introduced during the repair process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source and interpret repair information3.2 Analyse repair options and select those required for the circumstances3.3 Select and check repair tools, equipment and materials 3.4 Carry out repairs and component replacements and adjustments according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, safety and environmental requirements, and AS/NZ 2739 Natural gas (NG) fuel systems for vehicle engines, and without causing damage to components or system3.5 Carry out post-repair testing according to workplace procedures and AS/NZ 2739 to confirm fault rectification, and rectify any further problems detected as having been introduced during the repair process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source and interpret repair information3.2 Analyse repair options and select those required for the circumstances3.3 Select and check repair tools, equipment and materials 3.4 Carry out repairs and component replacements and adjustments according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, safety and environmental requirements, and AS/NZ 2739 Natural gas (NG) fuel systems for vehicle engines, and without causing damage to components or system3.5 Carry out post-repair testing according to workplace procedures and AS/NZ 2739 to confirm fault rectification, and rectify any further problems detected as having been introduced during the repair process.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Repair LNG fuel system

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures 4.3 Process workplace documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures 4.3 Process workplace documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures 4.3 Process workplace documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes
